extra.reason: T1 done: formula-drain.formula.toml created in dev-flow/.beads/formulas/; bd formula show + bd mol pour --dry-run both verify; jj describe applied. Lesson filed on epic re: required .formula.toml suffix (not .toml as spec/plan said).
T2 done: drain.md scaffold with frontmatter + usage stub for 5 modes; rumdl pass; allowed-tools augmented with Read/Grep/Glob per code reviewer + dev-flow convention; jj describe applied.

T3 done: /drain init section added with idempotent bootstrap (register drain type, cp -n formula, sanity check). Shell logic verified for empty/populated types.custom; cp -n provides idempotency on second run.

T4 done: epic-mode section added with 4 phases (pre-flight 7-check sequence, pour with type guard + metadata + parent link, sentinel composition, /goal directive). Reviewer Critical (bd show redirect order) pushed back as incorrect; Important (jj --no-pager flag position) applied.
T5 done: set-mode section added; mirrors epic-mode with per-seed scope validation, no parent linkage, set-mode sentinel. Code review pass clean.

T6 done: cascade-mode section added with per-seed validation, no parent linkage, sentinel + working-set-expansion explanatory note for Task 8's helper. Self-review thorough; pattern-mirror of T5 with documented Phase C addition.

T7 done: resume-mode section added with metadata recovery (drain_mode/drain_scope/drain_started_at via jq), validation guard for missing metadata, case-statement sentinel recomposition with unknown-mode fallback. Self-reviewed.

T8 done: 12-step /goal iteration body section added after Resume mode; all variable placeholders correct; success/halt termination paths correct; existing Phase D directives unchanged. Slash command content now functionally complete.

T9 done: dev-flow/skills/draining-beads/SKILL.md created (161 lines, under 500 limit). Frontmatter + 7 required topics covered. rumdl clean. ADR refs (fhsk-thw/0o2/rqh/ce3/0cd) and .formula.toml suffix correct.
